details: Completed in 3 min. Results pending review.

SQL injection ORDER BY fixed (8 tests), CORS already secure, EXPLAIN injection hardened (12 tests), silent exception already fixed. Branches pushed: fix/TODO-004-order-by-injection, fix/TODO-202-explain-injection

SKIP_AUTH removed from prod, prompt injection hardening (43 tests), rate limiting all API routes (60/min general, 20/min LLM), dump.rdb cleaned, refresh token rotation verified (91 tests). 5 branches pushed.

Snowflake SQL injection already fixed, NarrativeReactor CORS hardened with tests, Ultrafone secrets purged + rotation doc created, Second-Opinion HIPAA AES-256-GCM encryption on all PHI, IDOR signal access fixed with ownership checks (6 tests). 5 branches pushed.

JWT auth migration to simplejwt (8 files), analytical DB pooling with ThreadedConnectionPool (12 tests), Django 4.2/5.0 compat fixes (4 deprecated patterns), urllib→requests migration with connection pooling, .env.example expanded from 13→250 lines. 5 branches pushed.

signal-builder rate limiting on all endpoints, webhook HMAC validation (8 tests), signal-studio-frontend auth hardened (20 tests), signal-studio-templates ESM/CJS dual build fixed (35 tests), core-entityextraction 65 new tests (100% coverage). 5 branches pushed.

CI/CD for 4 repos + shared quality gate. forwardlane-backend GitHub Actions (ruff+bandit+pytest+coverage), signal-builder-backend Bitbucket Pipelines (lint+security+test), NarrativeReactor GitHub Actions (tsc+eslint+vitest+docker), signal-studio Bitbucket Pipelines (full gate). Shared ci-quality-check.sh auto-detects Python/Node.
Carousel slides 3-5 regenerated with clean dark aesthetic (matching slides 1,2,6,7). Overnight dashboard HTML built at overnight-summary.html with stats, timeline, branch inventory.

RBAC with role hierarchy (admin/editor/viewer, 10 admin routes guarded), API audit logging (structured JSON via Pino, fire-and-forget DB writes), 22 error.tsx error boundaries across all routes, bundle optimization (react-syntax-highlighter lazy-loaded -500KB), health check endpoint (Postgres+Redis+API concurrent checks). 52 new tests, zero regressions. Branch pushed to BB.

Second-Opinion Stripe subscription (4 Cloud Functions, checkout+webhook+usage metering, 3 free consultations/mo cap), medical disclaimer modal+banner, Ultrafone Twilio webhook validation on all 4 endpoints (4 tests), call recording consent notice (6 tests), FlipMyEra SEO with JSON-LD+sitemap+robots+OG tags (25 tests). 3 branches pushed.

forwardlane_advisor deps upgraded (mocha 3→11, sequelize 3→6, mysql→mysql2, 15+ deps), 63 tests passing (50 new), Trendpilot auth verified + 16 tests + build fix (npx→local tsc), Snowflake connection pool with thread-safe async pool + stale eviction + stats API (35 new tests). 3 branches pushed.

NarrativeReactor coverage: statements 68%→95.79%, branches 64%→83.60%, functions 60%→94.87%, lines 68%→96.39%. Fixed 12 failing tests. 397 total tests passing. New test files: db.test.ts, env.test.ts, productionGuard.test.ts. Branch pushed.
